name: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum
short_description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.
tasting_summary: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho is a complex golden rum with a deep, layered and mellow flavor of dried fruits, spices and oaky vanilla. Dried apricot and banana leaf Oak and spices Expansive and well-rounded
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho Rum is a dark, golden sipping rum and the Family Reserve, aged a minimum of eight years. It has a deep, layered, mellow profile with dried fruits, stone fruit, spices, oak, and oaky vanilla. The nose suggests dried apricot and banana leaf, while the palate brings oak and spice. The finish is expansive and well-rounded, with a smooth, rounded texture. Best enjoyed neat or on the rocks, and well suited to classic rum cocktails like an Old Fashioned, Old Cuban, Hotel Nacional, or Rum Negroni. Flavor tags: vanilla, oak, fruity, banana, dried fruit, spice.
display_description: After a minimum of eight years of waiting, BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho releases delightful flavors of stone fruits and spices.
